hero.description: Dedicated to the welfare, cultural preservation, and upliftment of the Gorkha community across India. Let's unite to build a stronger tomorrow.

features.heading: Unite for Our Heritage.
features.description: We are dedicated to preserving our rich cultural legacy, fostering unity, and securing a prosperous future for the Gorkha community.
features.card1Desc: Providing educational support and resources to empower our youth and build a knowledgeable community.
features.card2Desc: Organizing events to celebrate and promote Gorkha traditions, language, art, and vibrant heritage.
features.card3Desc: Creating a strong support network to assist members of the community in their social and economic upliftment.
